# The Raj Mahaal

> The Raj Mahaal — Sodepur's premier fully air-conditioned banquet hall.

The Raj Mahaal is Sodepur's premier fully air-conditioned banquet hall for weddings, receptions, birthdays, and corporate events. Capacity up to 500 guests.

## Site navigation

- [Home](https://therajmahaal.vercel.app/)
- [Rules](https://therajmahaal.vercel.app/rules)
- [Gallery](https://therajmahaal.vercel.app/gallery)
